task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the edit page for the 'Insulated Water Bottle' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento Admin product edit page is open, showing 'Insulated Water Bottle' in the page title or the SKU 'BOTTLE-001' in the SKU field.

task_completion.description: Verify a custom option was created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Customizable Options' section, a new option block is visible with the 'Option Title' field set to 'Laser Engraving'.

task_completion.description: Verify the option type is set to Text Field and it is not required.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Option Type' dropdown is set to 'Field' (under the Text category), and the 'Required' checkbox next to the option title is unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify the price and price type are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Laser Engraving' option configuration, the 'Price' field is set to '4.99' and the 'Price Type' dropdown is set to 'Fixed'.

task_completion.description: Verify the SKU and maximum characters are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Laser Engraving' option configuration, the 'SKU' field is set to 'engrave' and the 'Max Characters' field is set to '15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the product configuration was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A green success message stating 'You saved the product.' is visible at the top of the Magento Admin page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin web interface rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web browser displaying the Magento Admin panel, with no terminal windows executing database queries or Magento CLI commands to add the custom option.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show a real web browser interface with standard Magento UI elements (menus, buttons, form fields), not a text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the expected values into the actual form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values ('Laser Engraving', '4.99', 'engrave', '15') must be visible inside the specific input fields of the Magento Customizable Options form, not just typed into a search bar or unrelated text area.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target product SKU is 'BOTTLE-001'. In the Magento UI, the expected option type 'Text Field' typically appears as 'Field' under a 'Text' grouping (database value 'field'). The expected price type 'Fixed' is standard and corresponds to the 'fixed' database value.
